mapper.select: SELECT id, slug, name, description, enabled, DATE_FORMAT(created_at,'%Y-%m-%d') as createdAt FROM special_topic WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, slug, name, description, enabled, DATE_FORMAT(created_at,'%Y-%m-%d') as createdAt FROM special_topic WHERE slug = #{slug} AND enabled = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT b.id, b.name, b.author, b.cover, b.publish, b.size FROM special_topic_book tb LEFT JOIN book b ON b.id = tb.book_id WHERE tb.topic_id = #{topicId} ORDER BY tb.sort ASC, tb.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO special_topic(slug, name, description, enabled, created_at) VALUES(#{slug}, #{name}, #{description}, 1, NOW())
INSERT IGNORE INTO special_topic_book(topic_id, book_id, sort, created_at) VALUES(#{topicId}, #{bookId}, #{sort}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.slug, t.name, t.description FROM special_topic_book tb INNER JOIN special_topic t ON t.id = tb.topic_id WHERE tb.book_id = #{bookId} AND t.enabled = 1 ORDER BY tb.sort ASC, tb.id ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM special_topic_book WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND book_id = #{bookId}
